meta.title: WillChain – Digital Will on the Blockchain
meta.description: WillChain – automated digital will on the blockchain. Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir without lawyers or notaries.
meta.og_title: WillChain – Digital Will on the Blockchain
meta.og_description: Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir. No lawyers. No bureaucracy. Forever on the blockchain.

hero.title: When You're Gone – Your Assets Will Go to Your Designated Heir
hero.subtitle: Every year, thousands of people pass away without leaving instructions for their cryptocurrency. Loved ones know the funds exist but can't access them. WillChain solves this automatically.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: What Happens to Your Crypto After You're Gone?
problem.subtitle: Most people don't think about it until it's too late.
problem.card1_desc: If only you know the private key, your funds disappear forever when you pass. No court or notary can help here.
problem.card2_desc: Billions of dollars in cryptocurrency lie untouched in abandoned wallets. Their owners are gone, and the funds are locked forever – inaccessible to anyone.
problem.card3_desc: Even knowing the funds exist, without the key or password, family members cannot access them. It's a legal dead end.

how_it_works.label: 4 Steps
how_it_works.subtitle: Four simple steps to secure your crypto
how_it_works.title: How it Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Buy WILL tokens on an exchange or receive them from another holder. Your digital will activates as soon as you hold any amount of WILL.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Specify the wallet address of the person who should receive your assets after your prolonged inactivity or passing. This could be your spouse, child, friend – anyone you care about.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Any outgoing transaction automatically confirms your activity. If your wallet remains unused for a while, click 'I'm Here!' manually.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Set how long without activity the WillChain mechanism should trigger: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. This is followed by a 30-day grace period and 30 days for the heir.

credits.label: Trust
credits.title: Why Trust WillChain?
credits.subtitle: Transparency, security, and reliability are not just words; they are confirmed facts.
credits.opensource_desc: All code is published on GitHub. Anyone can verify that the contract does exactly what it promises.
credits.audit_desc: The contract underwent an audit in 4 categories: protocol, security, UX, operations. All identified issues have been resolved.
credits.tests_desc: Hardhat, Foundry fuzz, bot, frontend – every change is automatically tested before deployment.
credits.network_desc: Built on Base – a network from Coinbase. Transactions cost less than $0.01 and confirm in seconds.

trust.noncustodial_desc: No one but your heir will receive your funds

faq.label: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to log in to the site daily?
faq.a1: No. If you regularly use your crypto wallet, the timer resets automatically. The 'I'm Here!' button is only needed if your wallet is completely unused.
faq.a2: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. You can change this at any time. Those who trade frequently choose 30 days, while long-term investors choose 365.
faq.q3: What happens if the period expires?
faq.a3: A 30-day grace period begins – you can still confirm your presence. Then, the heir has 30 days to initiate a claim. If no heir is designated or they don't claim in time – the funds are returned to circulation: 47% are burned forever, 47% are distributed to WILL holders, 5% goes to the protocol, and 1% to the initiator.
faq.q4: Can someone change my heir without my knowledge?
faq.a4: No. Only you, with your private key, can change the heir. The contract guarantees this.
faq.q5: Does anyone see my personal data?
faq.a5: No. Only your wallet address, balance, and activity timestamps are stored on the blockchain. No names or personal information.
faq.q6: Where is the smart contract located?
faq.a6: Deployed on the Base Sepolia testnet. The source code is open and verified on Basescan.
faq.q7: Does the auto-timer reset work with multi-sig wallets?
faq.a7: If you use a standard wallet (MetaMask, Trust Wallet), the timer resets with any transfer. However, if you use Smart Wallets or Multisig (e.g., Safe), where a relayer executes transactions, you'll need to manually confirm your activity via the button on the site.
faq.q8: Can a DEX or dApp approval affect my inheritance?
faq.a8: No. Token approvals (allowances) do not affect your inheritance timer. Only your direct actions – a transfer, confirmActivity, or vault setup – count as presence confirmation. A third party using transferFrom() cannot reset your timer. Your inheritance will trigger even with active DEX allowances.
faq.q9: Can I designate an heir who has already designated me?
faq.a9: No. The contract prohibits circular inheritance (A→B and B→A simultaneously). This is a safeguard against a situation where both wallets block each other. If you wish to be mutual heirs, use an intermediate third-party address.

security.allowance_text: Only your direct actions count as presence confirmation: token transfers, activity confirmations, or vault setup. DEX swaps via allowances do not reset the timer. If you trade on a DEX, remember to confirm your activity separately.

disclaimer.title: Legal Information
disclaimer.modal_subtitle: Please read before connecting your wallet
disclaimer.s1_text: The WILL token is a utility token solely for managing digital inheritance within WillChain. Holding the token does not grant rights to profits, equity in the company, or any rights typical of securities.
disclaimer.s2_text: The token destruction mechanism is a technical tool for cleaning the network of inactive participants, not a promise of market value appreciation. We do not guarantee liquidity or future asset prices.
disclaimer.s3_text: The user bears full responsibility for maintaining activity or performing manual confirmation before the set deadline expires. Loss of access to private keys or missing the deadline will result in irreversible loss of access to funds.
disclaimer.s4_text: The protocol is deployed on Base (Ethereum L2). You agree to the risks associated with smart contract vulnerabilities or blockchain network updates. This is experimental software – use at your own risk.
disclaimer.s5_text: Users are obligated to verify independently whether using WillChain complies with the legislation of their jurisdiction.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept the terms. I understand that I am fully responsible for my activity and potential loss of assets.
